Draft Lab

Every stat Sleeper tracked in 2025/26, re-scorable on the fly. The inputs below start at last season's league scoring — change any value and every player's points, PPG and Per-90 recompute instantly, with the swing vs. the real 2025/26 scoring shown in the Δ column.
